title: Paypal MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Paypal MCP Server for Claude
Integrate PayPal commerce capabilities, payment processing, and transaction management
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** PayPal
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `payments` `paypal` `commerce` `transactions` `financial`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status paypal
```

## Config
```json
{
  "paypal": {
    "url": "https://mcp.paypal.com/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status paypal
